text:
----
Jokosher is a simple yet powerful multi-track studio. With it you can
create and record music, podcasts and more, all from an integrated
simple environment.

WWW: http://www.jokosher.org/
----

I do not use the port myself. Just wanted to try out the program.

BTW, does this port belong to python virtual category?
It's standalone app but installs into PYTHON_SITELIBDIR.
